text: Daniel San profile: Head of AI at hedgineer.io; building Claude Code SubAgents, Skills & Hooks; OSS project aitmpl.com; powered by TS, Python, and vanilla lattes. Software developer category; New York, USA; danielavila.me. 3,301 posts; 3,241 following; 3.1万 followers.

Pinned article: Keep your Claude Code context clean with Subagents. Preview says long Claude Code sessions get messy because every grep, find, and ls remains in context, and subagents run work in their own window and return only the useful result.
Daniel jokes that CoffeeScript should return because it uses fewer tokens per line of code and LLMs would like it. This is a token-efficiency and LLM-code ergonomics signal.
Daniel says he will keep playing with a project tomorrow and already set it up with Stripe. This is a builder-shipping signal around rapid AI app/payment integration.
Daniel says that if Anthropic launched its own GitHub he would move his repos there, adding GitClaude as a product-name idea. This is an Anthropic developer-platform demand signal.
